zh.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley是Roger de Berkeley的女兒，於1135年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾恩波利。她於1185年與Phillip FitzRobert de Gay在英國波克夏結婚。她去世於1190年6月16日在她的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley是Roger de Berkeley的女儿，于1135年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾恩波利。她于1185年与Phillip FitzRobert de Gay在英国波克夏结婚。她去世于1190年6月16日在她的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley was born in 1135, in Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Roger de Berkeley. She married Phillip FitzRobert de Gay in 1185, in Berkshire, England. She died on 16 June 1190, in her hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley est née en 1135, à Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Roger de Berkeley. Elle a épousé Phillip FitzRobert de Gay en 1185, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 16 juin 1190, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley wurde 1135 in Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Roger de Berkeley geboren. Sie hat 1185 in Berkshire, England Phillip FitzRobert de Gay geheiratet. Sie starb am 16. Juni 1190 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley è nata il nel 1135 nel Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Roger de Berkeley. Lei sposato Phillip FitzRobert de Gay nel 1185, nel Berkshire, England. Morì il 16 giugno 1190, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeleyは1135年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアソルンブリーでRoger de Berkeleyの娘として生まれた。1185年にイギリスバークシュアイアでPhillip FitzRobert de Gayと結婚した。彼女は1190年6月16日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley(은)는 1135년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토른버이에서 Roger de Berkeley의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1185년 영국 버크실르에서 Phillip FitzRobert de Gay(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1190년 6월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley nasceu em 1135, em Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Roger de Berkeley. Ela casou-se com Phillip FitzRobert de Gay em 1185, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 16 de junho de 1190, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley родилась в 1135 г. в местности таурнбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Roger de Berkeley. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Phillip FitzRobert de Gay в 1185 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. Она умерла 16 июня 1190 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cecily Berkeley nació en 1135, en Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Roger de Berkeley. Se casó con Phillip FitzRobert de Gay en 1185, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 16 de junio de 1190, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
